name: github-sdlc-plugins
description: Attested Claude Code plugin marketplace for the GitHub SDLC planning domain. Every plugin tarball is SHA-pinned, scanned across the org's quality gates, signed, and admitted to this catalog only when its attestations verify fail-closed.

plugins.name: github-sdlc-planning
plugins.description: Issues, native sub-issues, Projects v2, Milestones, and Discussions behind a portable MCP core plus a Claude Code progressive-enhancement layer. Every issue/discussion body carries MIF-conformant frontmatter authored via mif-docs.

plugins.name: github-pull-requests
plugins.description: Full pull-request lifecycle control: create, classify (type/size/risk labels), review-route, link to issues, and couple to Projects v2. Depends on github-sdlc-planning for its shared MIF comment-block reader and Projects v2 tools.

plugins.name: github-packages
plugins.description: List org packages and versions across npm, Maven, RubyGems, Docker (legacy registry), Container (ghcr.io), NuGet, and generic registries; delete/restore a package or version.
